title: ingest_run.input
description: Record an externally-executed prompt run (a run the caller executed against a provider outside Anseo's own orchestrator) so it feeds the same extraction -> redaction -> contribution path as a native run.

prompt_slug.description: Slug-safe identifier of a prompt already declared in the resolved project.

provider.description: Provider the external run was executed against (a first-party name or plugin:<id>).

model.description: Provider model/version string the external run used.

response_text.description: Raw provider response text. Optional when citation_domains is supplied directly.

citation_domains.description: Source domains observed in citations. When omitted, extracted from response_text.

observed_rank.description: The brand's observed rank in this run, if computed by the caller.

observed_at.description: When the external run was observed. Defaults to now.

contribute.description: Opt this run into the anonymous benchmark. Defaults to false. A true value with no per-project KEK is rejected. Note: full contribute enforcement requires Story 40.4.
